en.name: Kalashnikov SVDS 7.62x54R automatic sniper rifle
en.description: A modified version of the Kalashnikov SVDS sniper rifle chambered in 7.62x54R. The fire-control mechanism and operating system have been extensively reworked to provide three-round burst and fully automatic fire. Reinforced internal components allow the rifle to withstand the increased firing load, though the powerful cartridge and lightweight folding-stock configuration produce severe recoil during sustained fire.
